# Pranith Jain

> Security analyst and detection engineer investigating phishing, BEC, and malware at scale, and shipping two free, browser-side security products on Cloudflare Workers: CRUCIBLE (DFIR & Security Toolkit) and PANOPTICON (Threat Intelligence Platform). No signup. No data egress.

## What I do
- Investigate phishing, business email compromise, commodity malware, and lookalike-domain abuse across 1,300+ domains and 2,700+ mailboxes.
- Ship open, edge-native security tooling: CRUCIBLE (60+ DFIR utilities across 11 categories) and PANOPTICON (a live CTI platform pulling 90+ intel sources).
- Automate SOC analyst workflows with n8n and MCP servers, cutting mean triage time from ~4 hours to under 75 minutes.

## Tooling
- [CRUCIBLE — DFIR & Security Toolkit](https://pranithjain.qzz.io/dfir): 60+ browser-side tools for IOC checks, CVE triage, Sigma/KQL/SPL/YARA rule conversion, email defense, and STIX 2.1 work.
- [PANOPTICON — Threat Intelligence Platform](https://pranithjain.qzz.io/threatintel): Live CTI from 30+ feeds (ransomware leaks, threat actors, IOCs, CVEs, dark web, social media) with cross-source correlation and STIX/TAXII export.
- [CRUCIBLE — IOC Quick Check](https://pranithjain.qzz.io/dfir/ioc-investigate): Fast IOC / hash / URL enrichment across 24 sources.
- [CRUCIBLE vs VirusTotal, ANY.RUN, Hybrid Analysis, URLScan](https://pranithjain.qzz.io/dfir/vs): Side-by-side comparison of when to use which.

## Case Studies
- [Phishing program at scale](https://pranithjain.qzz.io/projects/phishing-program-at-scale): 250+ incidents, 25% false-positive drop, 35% per-case time cut.
- [60% spoofing drop wasn't all DMARC](https://pranithjain.qzz.io/projects/dmarc-spoofing-drop): Email-authentication program, attacker-economics framing.
- [Detection-rule converter workflow](https://pranithjain.qzz.io/projects): Sigma to KQL/SPL/YARA translation pipeline.

## Blog & Briefings
- [Blog index](https://pranithjain.qzz.io/blog): CVE deep-dives, threat actor profiles, malware analyses, ransomware coverage, AI security.
- [Daily threat briefings (RSS)](https://pranithjain.qzz.io/api/v1/briefings/rss): Synthesised daily/weekly CTI summaries from PANOPTICON.
- [Case study feed (RSS)](https://pranithjain.qzz.io/blog/rss.xml): All long-form write-ups.

- [Projects](https://pranithjain.qzz.io/projects): All public case studies and shipped work.
- [Behind the reports](https://pranithjain.qzz.io/behind-the-reports): Sources, methodology, and trust signals for PANOPTICON.
